creator: rsimmons0@gmail.com
text:
/etc/make.conf :

PERL5_DEFAULT=5.18

I don't have a /etc/src.conf. Also, here are all the software packages
that are installed on the box:

# pkg info

apr-1.4.8.1.5.3                Apache Portability Library
db6-6.0.20                     The Oracle Berkeley DB, revision 6.0
dialog4ports-0.1.5_2           Console Interface to configure ports
expat-2.1.0                    XML 1.0 parser written in C
gdbm-1.11                      GNU database manager
gettext-0.18.3.1               GNU gettext package
ldns-1.6.17                    Library for programs conforming to DNS
RFCs and drafts
libevent2-2.0.21               API for executing callback functions on
events or timeouts
netselect-0.3                  Ultrafast implementation of ping
nginx-1.4.5,1                  Robust and small WWW server
openssh-portable-6.5.p1_1,1    The portable version of OpenBSD's OpenSSH
pcre-8.34                      Perl Compatible Regular Expressions library
pkg-1.2.6                      New generation package manager
portmaster-3.17.3              Manage your ports without external
databases or languages
poudriere-3.0.14               Port build and test system
serf-1.3.3                     Serf HTTP client library
sqlite3-3.8.3.1                SQL database engine in a C library
subversion-1.8.8               Version control system
tmux-1.8_1                     A Terminal Multiplexer

On Mon, Mar 3, 2014 at 9:41 PM, Bryan Drewery <bdrewery@freebsd.org> wrote:
> Just tested and it works. Please also post your /etc/make.conf and
> /etc/src.conf.
> --
> Regards,
> Bryan Drewery
